hooks.command: sh -c 'if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] && [ -x "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/notify.sh" ]; then TUSH_PUSH_HOOK_EVENT=Stop exec "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/notify.sh"; fi; for d in "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/tush-push/*; do if [ -x "$d/scripts/notify.sh" ]; then TUSH_PUSH_HOOK_EVENT=Stop exec "$d/scripts/notify.sh"; fi; done; echo "tush-push notify.sh not found" >&2; exit 0'

sh -c 'if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] && [ -x "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/notify.sh" ]; then TUSH_PUSH_HOOK_EVENT=PermissionRequest exec "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/notify.sh"; fi; for d in "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"/plugins/cache/*/tush-push/*; do if [ -x "$d/scripts/notify.sh" ]; then TUSH_PUSH_HOOK_EVENT=PermissionRequest exec "$d/scripts/notify.sh"; fi; done; echo "tush-push notify.sh not found" >&2; exit 0'
